- Fixed girl ratings screen not showing all configs.
- Fixed corruption trait level images possibly not having the correct index identifier.
- Fixed 'female_' and 'lesbian_' orgasm video variants being detected as invalid, i.e 'female_lick_pussy_orgasm'.
- Fixed various cumming/finishing video variants being detected as invalid, i.e 'facial_blowjob'.
- Fixed actions not correctly showing if the girl has a custom video if its not the player doing the action.
- Added 'fist_pussy_self' and 'fist_ass_self' shoot tag backwards compatibility.
- ExamManager 'generate_girls_in_class' now removes them from any hangout locations.
- Fixed 'move_girl_to_location' not always properly dressing girls based on the location.
- Fixed videos possibly getting stuck during 'home_visit_mother_get_topless' and 'home_visit_mother_get_naked' labels.
- Fixed 'move_girl_to_location' generating body images both in 'unassign_girl_from_all_locations' and when dressing the girl.
- Fixed 'move_girl_to_location' not generating new body images if there is no preferred clothing.
- Fixed video files with the 'cover' keyword being used as videoshoot cover images.
- Improved the inventory/gift layout for items with long names.
- Fixed new game reset not completely resetting when manually selecting girls.
- Fixed jobs not being updated for girls when the pass.
- Fixed location tags from 'database_location_video_tags' not being added correctly for some locations.
- Fixed possible error when selecting wallpapers if 'selected_girl' becomes unselected.
- Fixed girls being removed from some locations before dialogue ends which could change their portraits.
- Fixed mothers not getting their 'left' status removed when rejoining the academy.
- Fixed upgrade box showing on when 'selected_upgrade_section' is None.
- Fixed exam related stats not being applied to all classes if the player skips class.
- Fixed inconsistent spacing in exam and sex screen layouts.
- Fixed various labels using generic 'orgasm' videos over action specific ones.
- Fixed being able to call sponsors past 7 pm.
- 'home_visit_discuss_reported_requests' label now also clears any queued report calls.
- 'teachers_lounge' event type now correctly just selects girls that are in that room.
- Mothers now also update homework subjects in 'update_from_config'.
- 'debug_unlock_shoots' now also adds the shoots to the girls completed shoots.
- Fixed being able to take a mothers panties multiple times during home visit punishments.
- Viewing a specific girl rating and leaving the menu no longer clears 'search_term'.
- Fixed punished girls remote line not showing if accepting girls also give you their remotes.
- Fixed 'upper' clothing not being revealed due to damage.
- Shoot 'l:' filter now only takes the max lewdness into account rather than both max and min. Fixing weird filtering inclusions.
- Fixed UI layout for wallpaper related screens.
- Made sure conflicting 'wealth' traits are removed during generation.
- 'generic_action_misc_flash' now falls back to 'flash_boobs' if no flash options are valid.
- Added check to make sure girl multipliers stats can't go to 0.
- Fixed some rule breaks, such as incorrect 'underwear' and 'buttplug' only being added during exam intro inspection.
- Added additional check to 'apply_action_impacts' to prevent applying to girls not in the class/interaction.
- Fixed Player 'apply_impacts' reducing impacts it shouldn't and when it shouldn't.
- Closing 'academy_navigation_menu' now sets 'selected_academy_floor' to 0.
- 'description_text' is only added to 'confirm_user_choice' screen if given.
- 'get_phone_background' now scales based on image size rather than if 'shoot' is in the path.
- Fixed 'is_during_shoot' not being set to False when a 'post_shoot' event triggers.
- Fixed modder tags being cut off at the bottom of the screen.
Modding Changes: - Added '_topless' and '_bottomless' variants for all body images, i.e 'uniform_topless'.
- Sponsors will now load 'event_config.json' in their directory like girls.
- Added 'clothing_wear_chance_modifiers' and 'clothing_purchase_chance_modifiers' to Trait class.

- Added hooks for pre-exam intro, pre-exam, post-exam, pre-sex and post-sex. Allowing labels/functions to be called at these points. See 'game/scripts/databases/hooks/hooks_database_ren.py' for details.
- Added 'get_girl_by_job_name' util function.
- Added 'filter_requirements' to Rule class. If True they rule won't be visible in the rule list.
- Added 'post_graduation' event type. 'girl' participant is a girl graduating and 'not_graduating' are girls not graduating but could.
- Added 'during_sex' event type. 'sex_girl' participant is a girl in the interaction and 'sex_girl_left' are girls who left.
- Added 'database_coffee_shop_booth_options' to allow modding new dialogue options when talking to a girl in the booth at the coffee shop.
- Added 'accept_function' and 'refuse_function' to Gift class. Function is called when girl accepts/refuses gift.
- Added 'consume_function' to ConsumableItem class. Function is called when the player consumes the item.
- Added 'total_photoshoots_completed' and 'total_videoshoots_completed' variables.
- Added custom 'request_handler_function' support to Sponsor class.
- Added 'dress_on_invite' option for 'database_hang_out_locations'.
- Added 'cum_targets' field to database_action_impacts which can be used to define cum targets for the action ID.
- Added 'base_directory_path' to Event class. Use for girl/sponsor events, will use their folder as the base, allows 'current_event.show_video('videoshoots/my_shoot/1.webm')'
- Added 'self_insert_buttplug' for when girl inserts her own buttplug, 'strip_buttplug' would be used for her removing her own buttplug.
- Added fullbody analyzing to GirlRating.
- Girl events 'same_participant_cooldown' now defaults to the 'event_cooldown' if not given. Since it is used to control the cooldown.
- Added 'girl.event_completed('event_id')' function to Girl class, this should be used over checking her 'event_tracker'.
- Added 'apply_target_impacts_to_all_girls' argument to 'apply_action_impacts'. If True it uses the 'target_girl' impacts for 'other girls' as well.
- Added 'can_make_other_girls_cum' argument to 'apply_action_impacts'. If True it uses the actions 'can_make_girl_cum' even for 'other girls'.
- Corrected image name when checking requirements for wallpapers. It is the full path without the file extension.
- Added 'video_main_tag' attribute to Action class, only needed if the video tag isn't the same as the 'action_entry_name' name.
- Each player 'skill' now has its own set of stats it influences.
- Added 'avoid_topless_portraits' variable which can be used to prevent using topless portrait images. Should be set back to False when done.
- Added debug exam action to regenerate body images.
- Fixed new PC and settings button indexes going past maximum available slots.
- Added arousal level support to body images. Tags: 'aroused' and 'edging' i.e 'face-aroused'.
- Added option to view single girl's debug screen, requires debug mode to be active.
- Added action tracking for exam/sex 'sessions', using 'girl.get_action_count_for_session(ACTION_NAME)' for the count.
- Moved various girl debug errors/warnings to their own lists for cleaner display.
- Added 'missed_classes' and 'missed_classes_this_week' to Player class, tracking how many classes have been missed.
- Added 'classes_ended_early' and 'classes_ended_early_this_week' to Player class, tracking how many classes have been ended early.
- Added 'ignore_bra' and 'ignore_panties' arguments to Girl 'is_topless' and 'is_bottomless' respectively, 'is_nude' can take both. Used by fullbody topless/bottomless checks.
- Changed how threesome actions are added, now you can just tag a SexAction with 'allow_as_ffm' and/or 'allow_as_mmf' while including a 'ffm_name' and/or 'mmf_name'.
- Added 'ignore_wearing_state' argument to ClothingManager 'can_remove_clothing_from_part' function. Can be used to check if clothing would be accessible even if she isn't actually wearing it.
- Moved 'orgasm' impacts to 'database_action_impacts'. Also added support for impacts based on action name i.e 'fuck_ass_orgasm'.
- Added 'revealingness' and 'revealingness_comfortability_range' attributes to Clothing class.
- Added 'max_uniform_clothing_revealingness' attribute to Rule class.

- Removed 'job_name' usage in 'database_job_and_work_hours'. It now uses the ID as the name, a new 'job_tag' entry can be given and it will be used for clothing selection. i.e 'nurse' for clothing tagged with the 'nurse' clothing tag.
- Girl 'get_job_tag' function now uses the 'job_tag' entry in the databases, to avoid hardcoded tags such as 'teacher' or 'secretary.
- Renamed variables 'scheduled_secretary' to 'scheduled_academy_secretary' and 'scheduled_nurse' to 'scheduled_academy_nurse' for clarity and consistency.
- Moved inventory management to its own InventoryManager class and added inventories to girls and mothers.
- Added 'database_post_exam_round_hooks' and 'database_post_sex_round_hooks' where functions or labels can be run after actions complete.
- Added new store item type 'TrainingItem' which can be used to train the player stats and give him traits.
- Added new store item type 'TrainingGift' which can be gifted to train a girls stats and give her traits.
- Added 'player_only' attribute to Trait class, can be used to make sure girls can't earn this trait.
- Added list support to 'database_event_girl_list' entries i.e ['girls_in_coffee_shop', 'girls_in_clothing_store']
- Added 'database_event_participants' to handle girls working in locations.
- Added 'stats_description' attribute to StoreItem which is used for better formatted descriptions.
- Added 'get_config_by_id' method to Academy class, can be used to get a girls config using her id.
- Added 'database_post_skip_time_hooks' which is called whenever time passes. It is passed 'hours' and 'minutes' skipped as arguments.
- Event requirements now get passed whether the event is being triggered via dialogue with 'is_dialogue'.
- EventManager 'force_start_event' will now try generating participants for generic participant tags i.e 'girl' in ['riley_reid', 'girl']
- Added 'can_get_bored' argument for action impacts, if False the girls don't get bored of the action and reduce its impacts. Defaults to True
- Added custom 'outfit_keys' support when dressing girls, allows changing the order clothing is chosen. You will probably never need this.
- Added 'ignored_outfit_keys' field to 'database_hang_out_locations'. Allows clothing types not follow tag requirement. Defaults to ['buttplug']
- Added 'remove_b_top' and 'remove_b_bot' tags for removing bikini top and bottoms respectively.
- Added 'get_first_portrait_image' to ImageManager which returns the first portrait with no other tags.
- Added function support for 'database_event_girl_list' entries.
- Added new 'walk' video type, used when walking through the park, on the beach and pier with a girl.

- The 'vibrator' clothing tag will now work for all clothing types. You can use the clothing items ID as a key to set its available levels in the 'game/scripts/databases/vibrator_vibration_levels_ren.py'.

- Added new clothing tags for clothing: 'passive_pressure_l', 'passive_arousal_l', 'passive_pressure_m', 'passive_arousal_m', 'passive_pressure_h', 'passive_arousal_h' which increase a girls pressure and/or arousal by 0.25, 0.5, 0.75 while wearing them. For exams and sex this is per minute.
- Added special trait checks for girl media files for fake boobs, so you can prevent them from showing up until later i.e 'grope_boobs-small_boobs_only'.
- Matching 'not_' tags now also get a bonus like '_only' tags.
- Added support for 'soft' mod requirements, allowing mods to be used while requirements are missing.
- Added 'pasties' and 'nc' tag support to 'boobs' body images, for 'pasties' and 'nipple clamps' respectively.
- Added 'pp' 'pw' and 'pc' tag support to 'pussy' body images, for 'pussy plug', 'pussy weights' and 'pussy clamps' respectively.
- Added 'database_clothing_quality_tags' which can modify stats such as value, lewdness, revealingness, protection. They are randomly added when clothing is added to a girls wardrobe.
- Event types 'during_exam', 'during_night_class' and 'during_sex' now allow girl that is being interacted with. You can use 'not girl.interacted_with' in your requirements for old behavior.
- TimeManager 'skip_time' minutes now default to 0 rather than 30.
- Removed location check for sleeping late in 'sleep_after_dream' but added 'allow_sleeping_in' variable which defaults to True.
- Event 'return_label' for unknown event types now defaults to 'global_current_location_label' rather than 'home'.
- Added event hint support for sponsor map locations. See 'game/scripts/databases/locations/map_locations_ren.py' for more details.
- EventManager 'event_type_is_available' now adds the event type if it is unknown.
- Added 'review_label' and 'escort_label' attributes to SponsorRequest. Can be used to see how a request went or if you go with respectively. Currently it doesn't 'remember' you choices or anything.
